save.title: Save Management
save.emptySlots: No save slot metadata; complete character creation or import from the management page to see the list.
save.autoSave.timepoint.label: Timepoint Save
save.autoSave.timepoint.hint: Timepoint saves run while this panel is open, writing to the dedicated 'Timepoint Save' slot.
save.backup.parseError: File parsing failed, please verify the file format
save.github.hint: Sync your full save data to your GitHub private repository. Requires a Personal Access Token (Fine-grained, Contents Read & Write).
save.github.hintBefore: Sync your full save data to your GitHub private repository. Requires a
save.github.downloadConfirmText: This action will overwrite all local data (saves, settings, images). This cannot be undone.
save.lan.hint: Devices on the same WiFi can transfer saves via this relay. Data only exists in the dev server's memory and is cleared when the terminal closes.
save.presets.hint: Export/import user-customized worlds, origins, traits, talents, etc. as standalone files. Small and easy to share between players. Does not include saves, vectors, or API configuration.
save.presets.exportEmpty: No custom presets available for export
save.presets.notEnabled: Custom presets feature is not enabled
save.presets.importFormatError: Wrong file format — expected a custom presets pack (type=custom_presets)
save.presets.importVersionError: Preset pack version {version} is higher than the current supported v{supported}, please upgrade the app before importing
save.presets.importPackMismatch: This preset pack is from pack "{source}", but the current active pack is "{target}". Importing may cause display issues due to field mismatches. Continue?
save.presets.noPack: Unable to determine target game pack
save.import.warningFull: This operation will clear all local data and replace it with the backup
save.import.warningFullList1: All existing characters, saves, and vectors will be deleted
save.import.warningFullList2: All API configurations, UI settings, and Prompt overrides will be replaced
save.import.warningFullList3: Recommended: click 'Export Backup' first to save current data
save.import.warningFullList4: If the backup contains an active game pointer, it will auto-resume after refresh
save.import.acknowledge: I understand this operation will replace all local data
save.import.warningProfile: This operation only adds or overwrites the characters listed above
save.import.warningProfileHint: Other characters, API configurations, and global settings are not affected.
save.import.acknowledgeRequired: Please check the confirmation box first — this operation will replace all local data
save.vectors.rebuildEmpty: No Engram events, no rebuild needed
save.overwrite.title: Confirm Overwrite
save.overwrite.text: This save already has data. Are you sure you want to overwrite? This cannot be undone.
